name: FancyButton
description: High-emphasis button with a gradient-filled surface and ring shadow (Neutral/Primary/Destructive), or a plain bordered surface (Basic). 3 sizes, 3 states (default/hover/disabled).

type.description: neutral = dark surface; primary = accent-colored surface (theme-switchable via --primary-base); destructive = error-red surface; basic = plain white bordered surface

size.description: md (40px, radius-10) · sm (36px, radius-8) · xs (32px, radius-8)

leftIcon.description: RemixIcon name without ri- prefix. e.g. 'arrow-left-s-line'.

rightIcon.description: RemixIcon name without ri- prefix. e.g. 'arrow-right-s-line'.

state.description: Forces a visual state for design QA. Leave unset in real usage — native :hover/:focus-visible drive Default/Hover, and the `disabled` prop drives Disabled.

aria: aria-disabled on <a>, real disabled attribute on <button>
